sourceSummary.oneLine: Software version register listing software, firmware, FPGA, SDK, and console versions with compatible models, changes, issue dates, and application dates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to track SW 명칭, 구분, 버전, 호환 모델, 변경점 내용, 발행일, 적용일, and 비고 for product software validation/version control.
keyPoints: Initial XAS SW 1.0.0 release applied to HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG on 12/3/19.
EngineeringTool SW 1.1.1 applies to G-series and GT1717C/GT1717CP models and was issued/applied on 4/30/26.
BlueSdk was replaced by AbyzSdk with note: 기존 BlueSdk 폐기, Blue & Cyan 통합 SDK로 운영.
cyan.dll FW 1.0.0 is identified as Cyan 용 Engine (Firmware) for GT1717C and GT1717CP.
XAS3 SW 1.0.0 is described as Blue, Cyan 통합 Acqusition & Calibration SW.

evidence.claim: The document is a software version management register.
The register tracks software name, category, version, compatible model, change content, issue date, application date, and remarks.
XAS SW 1.0.0 was initially released for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG with issue and application date 12/3/19.
XAS SW 1.0.0.6 removed Bright-operation Dark-operation functionality and was issued/applied on 11/19/24.
evidence.evidenceText: XAS,SW,1.0.0.6,"""",Bright 동작 시 Dark 동작 기능 제거,,11/19/24,11/19/24

evidence.claim: Engineering Tool SW 1.1.0 added ADC reading, Cut image resize, state display, setup pattern separation by model upload file, and Aging Dark dark noise correction algorithm application.
evidence.evidenceText: Engineering Tool,SW,1.1.0,"""","기능 추가 : ADC 읽기 기능, Cut 이미지 Resize 기능, State 표기 추가, Setup에 모델별 업로드 파일을 구분할 수 있는 Pattern 방식 추가, Aging Dark 취득에 Dark noise correction 알고리즘 적용

evidence.claim: AXD_Firmware FW 1.1.0 added AES key environment variable registration/call, DTH encrypted data transfer, and optional Dark Noise Correction.
evidence.evidenceText: AXD_Firmware,FW,1.1.0,"""","기능 추가 : Patch 파일 복호화용 AES Key 환경 변수 등록 및 호출 기능 ADC 기능이 있는 경우 배터리 충전중 상태에 ADC를 사용하여 체크하는 기능 Sleep State 읽기 기능 DTH에 데이터 암호화 전송 기능 추가 Dark Noise Correction 기능 추가 (Optional)

evidence.claim: BlueSdk SDK 1.1.0 added cyber security, Cpp wrapping, CibLib, and Log Download APIs.
evidence.evidenceText: BlueSdk,SDK,1.1.0,"""","기능 추가 : Cyber security 적용, Cpp wrapping, CibLib 추가, Log Download 관련 API 추가

evidence.claim: AXD SW 1.1.0 added auto reconnection, log download, and firmware update functions.
evidence.evidenceText: AXD,SW,1.1.0,"""","기능 추가 : Auto Reconnection 기능 추가, Log 다운로드 기능 추가, 펌웨어 업데이트 기능 추가

evidence.claim: EngineeringTool SW 1.1.1 applies to G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, G1717FWP, GT1717C, and GT1717CP.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
No single document date is clearly identified; the source contains approval dates and many software issue/application dates.
No standards are cited in the source text.
Some compatible model fields are ditto-style empty quote markers, so model compatibility may inherit from prior rows but is not explicit on those rows.
Source contains likely typographical variants such as 'Engineering Tool' and 'EngineeringTool', and 'Acqusition'.
